memberdef.argsstring: (self, asyncio.StreamReader reader, asyncio.StreamWriter writer, bool is_client=True)
memberdef.name: __init__

para.verbatim:
Open new stream.
Returns: New MplexStream instance
Raises: MplexClosedError: Session is closed

Accept inbound stream.
Args: timeout: Accept timeout in seconds
Returns: Accepted MplexStream
Raises: MplexClosedError: Session is closed asyncio.TimeoutError: Accept timeout

Mplex session for multiplexing streams.
Manages multiple logical streams over a single connection.
Features: - Open new streams - Accept inbound streams - Frame handling - Session management
